title: System Prompt
description: The system prompt is assembled from runtime state and cached by a deterministic context key.

steps.annotation: Prompt inputs are explicit runtime data.
A new context key causes sections to be selected and joined.

steps.content: I can use the workspace, memory index, tool guidance, and available skills for this task.
steps.annotation: The LLM sees the assembled prompt, not a hardcoded static string.

steps.content: same context key -> reuse cached prompt
steps.annotation: Repeated turns avoid rebuilding identical prompt text.
